name: egg sandwich
ingredients: toast bread; cheese; egg; black pepper spice; salt
instructions: Break the eggs in the pan; Add salt and black pepper.; Put the cheese on the toast; When the bottom side of the egg is fried, flip it over.; Once both sides are fried, place the eggs on the toast.

name: ceaser salad
ingredients: lettuce; chicken; parmesan cheese; garlic; lemon; yogurt; mayonnaise
instructions: Place the chicken in the air fryer; Cut the lettuce into medium-sized pieces; Mix the mayonnaise, yogurt, garlic, and lemon together.; Mix the chopped lettuce with the mixture; Once the chicken is ready, place it with the lettuce and the mixture.
